tender.title: Younger Adults Supported Accommodation Short Term Service - Fareham.
tender.description:
This contract will cover Younger Adults Supported Accommodation Services commissioned by Hampshire County Council.

Younger Adults Supported Accommodation means - Accommodation that has some element of care and support attached to it - this could be from a few hours per week of shared support to 24/7 support with a team of support staff

This service requires a Support Provider who is confident to support individuals with complex needs who may present with behaviours which Challenge.

A management oversight of the Service which understands PBS and can guide and support the staff team and work with the involved Health Professionals to deliver safe and effective support

Ability to implement safe and effective systems to monitor and respond to the health needs of the individuals and ensure that support is being  delivered consistently, correctly and recording is being completed effectively. 

The provider is expected to meet a range of care and support needs from prompting with personal care and daily living activities to full assistance of 1:1 or 2:1 support workers for all personal care and daily living activities, including hoisting and the use of other equipment to support with mobility needs

tender.title: CPU 3972 Supported Accommodation for Young People (16 Years+) Block Contract
tender.description:
Nottingham City Council are seeking a suitably experienced organisation to provide a small block contract to provide high quality, Supported Accommodation, for up to 10 young people aged 16 years and over, to move towards living more independently, but with support available when required. Placements must be within Nottingham City and the Greater Nottingham conurbation, and within a 20-mile radius from Nottingham City Centre.
The contract duration will be for 3 years with a possible extension of 2 + 2 years  The contract value is estimated to be £390,000 per annum.  Anticipated contract start date will be 1 April 2022.

This contract will be let under the Light Touch Regime of the Public Contract Regulations 2015.

Application documents can be downloaded from www.eastmidstenders.org. Closing date for receipt of completed Application Forms is 12 noon 24 November 2021.

tender.id: IT-255-599-WP3762 - Domestic Abuse Emergency Accommodation - AWARD
tender.title: WP3762 - Domestic Abuse Emergency Accommodation - AWARD
tender.description:
The Council wishes to procure a provider to provide domestic abuse emergency accommodation. The Council are seeking a provider to provide 27 units within the Walsall area which adhere to safe accommodation to meet the needs of vulnerable customers and their children, while also complying to the Domestic Abuse Act 2021.  
      o Lot 1 - Hybrid model bed 8 minimum, 12 Maximum refuge unit and the remaining in dispersed units.
      o Lot 2 - 27 Dispersed units across the Borough.

address.streetAddress: 178, Birmingham Road, West Bromwich, West Midlands, United Kingdom, B70 6QG
